item.title: Bottom shelf nightmare dump.
item.description:
@HileyNoteson Yoooooooooooooooooooooo
I don't think Imgur would like the original? I'll post the uncensored version in the comments.
You can catch me live on twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka streaming with my favorite Imgurians from the Bottom Shelf Community server.
Join for the games! We've been playing Lethal Company, Red Dead Redemption 2, Pay Day 3, GTA V, Jackbox, Among Us, 7 Days to Die, Sea of Thieves, Barotrauma, Minecraft, Ultimate Chicken Horse...if there's a specific game you like, I guarantee you'll find a shitposting meme loving Imgurian there to play it with you. Join for the memes! Imgurians share memes in the meme dumpster 24/7 Join for the Awe! Pay your pet taxes in the pet tex channel Join for the NSFW memes! Join for the art studio and meet some amazing Imgurian artists! Join to chat with hilarious people! Join to lurk in the corners! Join for the shockingly magnificent balance of wholesomeness and chaos. discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka Still unsure about the server? Check out our museum of stupidity. https://imgur.com/gallery/FYpqqAf
Join for the meme challenges in the meme-cage-match channel
Deaf cat Magoo (short for Oogala Magoogala) tax. (Here's my actual #art dump for those interested https://imgur.com/gallery/ZaekQkF )
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka

item.title: Where is the kiss going to?

item.title: Things I saw on home inspections this month
item.description:
Hello friends, it's your friendly neighbourhood home inspector back with another dump of photos from this month. Business is still slow and will likely be so for at least another month so my weekly dumps will be monthly for now.
We are going to start this one off with a single kernel of forbidden popcorn. Vermiculite in Canada largely came from a single company which in turn got their stock from the Libby mine in Montana. Vermiculite from that mine was contaminated with asbestos which can cause cancer if inhaled. Without testing at a lab I can't say if this contains asbestos or not but I can say the cost of removal is high thousands on the low end. Not disturbing it is an option but then when it comes time to sell it can cause issues with the deal.
We found some old open wire plugs in the home which was to be expected as it predated 1962. If your home was built post 1962 and you have an open ground system the ground wire might just be loose or fallen off, or someone didn't do the job right. Either way call up an electrician.
This basement has flooded in the past and has been redrywalled. I'd be willing to bet there is missing insulation behind that drywall. The darker areas also had moisture content but the photo with the moisture meter was corrupted.
Some arcing or overheating occured on the bus bar. Call up an electrician to see if everything is kosher.
Not my best picture but a previous occupant had cut a hole and made their own duct out of a flexible hose.
So as a home inspector I'm not allowed to call mould mould. Instead it's an apparent biological growth.
Another thermal photo. Those thermal anomalies represent a leak from above. I also used a moisture meter here and it ranged from 66% to 89%. Mould growth can occur in 48 hours if the right conditions are met so hopefully the owner deals with this sooner rather than later.
Their downspout broke and is draining along the foundation.
I screwed up and don't have a picture of the other side. Do you see how the AC is unlevel? Yeah that's because the ground from the broken pipe is eroding the ground and causing more drainage issues.
Okay not the end of the worl-
Oh. This might need some help it shouldn't be crooked
This is the inside of an old single chamber septic that hasn't been pumped in a while. Mmm poop. Nowadays two chamber tanks are the norm and have been for a long time. While septics if properly cared for can in theory last a century those are the exception not the norm. Most installers will give a number between 20-40 years so this one is probably beyond that.
Another shot from outside. One of the main reasons two chambers are superior is to help prevent solids from flowing into your septic field and clogging it up. When you neglect to pump it and those solids go over the end of that T bad things can happen.
I can't even see the inlet pipe.
Some old two prong plugs which means they are almost certainly open ground.
Someone used some non-permanent shark bites on the main water near the shutoff.
Sylvania had some issues with the breakers (I think I could be misremembering the exact part with the issue it's early and I haven't had a coffee) which led to overheating. As such I always flag the name brand from a further investigation by an electrician.
Sure looks like there was some weeping down that chimney maybe the flashing was done. Hard to tell because you know snow.
Some water coming through the pad in the basement. I'd expect more come the spring.
Their furnace had a leak. An HVAC tech can find the fault and fix it.
See how the inside of that window is bowing onwards? More broken seals it's been a while since I posted about those.
It's hard to tell from this photo but the bottom right of that white "repair" was actually bowing outwards and in need of a mason to repair it correctly.
Someone's puppers was digging under the deck.
Thus ends another dump. If you are ever on Old Barry's Bay road go check out the old log flume. It's very pretty in the winter.
item.dc:creator: XeononSolomon

item.title: Lord of the Rings Wholesome (meme) dump
item.description:
1. Awww
2
3. He must be stopped!
4
5. Ask why Aragorn is overacting when kicks the helmet?
6
7. I get that playing golf might be fun, but I will never understand people that are WATCHING it. Also how come the prize money are so huge?
8
9
10
11
12
13
14. You should have said it!
15. And finally I would like to share with this awesome community my passion project. Me and my brother have started working games in the past few years. From scratch basically and we learned how to do it on our own. Today I'm proud to say our third game is close to release. It's inspired by the "The Stanley Parable" (same kinda of style and humor) and it would mean the world to us if you wishlisted the game on Steam. Check out the page here: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/ Also we finally have a voice actor to narrate the game! : ) I wish you all success in your personal passion projects! It's a blast to work on one :)))
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: Positive action - Don't just talk about love, do something
item.description: Someone is taking positive actions, big or small, in response to negative things every single day even if you don't hear or see them. "Thank you" to all you positive action people. Cheers!

item.title: I'm seeing some complaints about a flag in the new Suicide Squad game. I thought I'd share a comic based on a thing Kevin Conroy wrote. "Finding Batman".
item.description: Some people don't know how good they have it if only a flag is something that angers them. Imagine living your life being told what you are is wrong and bad. Forced Heteronormity was (and is) shoved down queer people's throats every day. Some have to conform to survive Front Page Edit: Batman is cool.

item.title: The Rent Is Too D@mn High!
item.description: Homes are less affordable now than during the Great Depression. During the Great Depression, the median annual income was 22% of the cost of an average home. In 2022 it was 14% and it's only gotten worse in 2024. https://finance.yahoo.com/news/average-income-earners-dont-enough-200912961.html?guccounter=1

item.title: Thanks mom, you're such a dick
item.description: TLDR; It's not really her fault. She was (is) bipolar. Just here to vent into the void, because getting angry at her accomplishes nothing. I was a teenager and the HPV vaccine was pretty new. I was a boarder at school. My school offered all the girls the option to get it. I chose yes. I was pretty sure I wanted to have lots of sex in my life, and as little cancer as possible. I thought about it very little. Vaccinations seemed very normal to me. I thought anyone who wasn't getting it was an idiot and a prude. Somehow, my mom found out. Maybe they needed her consent? I don't know, but she unleashed full rage on the school when she found out about it. How could they let a teenager make a decision like this?? Next thing I know, I'm not getting the HPV vaccine. I thought my mom was being crazy, but this was par for the course. So, I carried on my life. Now I'm 32, I've got HPV and not a good strain. After LEEP, the lesions came back, lots of them and very fast. Everything points to cervical cancer -- not later, or in a couple years -- NOW. So I'm getting a total hysterectomy. Now. Good thing we caught it in time. Good thing I'm married. Good thing my husband didn't really want kids. Good thing we've got enough money. I feel very grateful for a lot of things. Just super super very fucking pissed at my mom. WOULD HAVE BEEN NICE TO CHOOSE NOT HAVE KIDS RATHER THAN HAVING THE THREAT OF CERVICAL CANCER MAKE THE DECISION FOR ME. NOT TO MENTION THAT I AM UNDERGOING A DANGEROUS MEDICAL PROCEDURE. AND KICKER THAT I HAVE A PANIC ATTACK EVERY TIME I *SEE* A NEEDLE OR AN IV. In fairness, my mom was a paranoid bipolar, grieving, doing her best, which was often terrible, but what's the point of being mad at her for something she likely doesn't even remember. Also, I now understand that the media is full of terrifying sensational nonsense, which I can imagine she must find difficult to navigate since her brain tells her terrifying sensational nonsense all by itself. JUST WISH I COULD KICK HER IN THE FACE RIGHT NOW. Or shout at her, "you awful fucking cow, I am 32 and how you are STILL HURTING ME" Anyway, into the void my sad story goes. Lesson of this story kids is please vaccinate your children and vaccinate your girls for HPV. Also living with someone who has a mental illness is really hard. Silver lining, no more periods. Yay?
item.dc:creator: schmitschmat

item.title: Can you imagine
item.description: The amateur radio enthusiast, known only by his call sign, managed to establish a connection with the orbiting laboratory using a combination of skill, patience, and a DIY antenna. The International Space Station is equipped with an amateur radio station that allows astronauts to communicate with people on Earth. This program, known as ARISS (Amateur Radio on the International Space Station), has been in operation for many years and provides an opportunity for students, educators, and amateur radio operators to connect with astronauts in space. To make contact with the ISS, the man built a Yagi-Uda antenna, also known as a “beam” antenna, from scratch. This type of antenna is highly directional and can be used to transmit and receive radio signals over long distances. He then carefully calculated the orbit of the ISS and waited for the right moment to make his call.
item.dc:creator: alwaysbrushyourteeth

item.title: Destroyed - where is there for the people of Gaza to return to?
item.description:
As of 17 January, analysis of satellite data by Corey Scher of the City University of New York and Jamon Van Den Hoek of Oregon State University reveals that between 50% and 62% of all buildings in Gaza have likely been damaged or destroyed https://www.theguardian.com/world/ng-interactive/2024/jan/30/how-war-destroyed-gazas-neighbourhoods-visual-investigation?CMP=Share_AndroidApp_Other

item.title: Images of Note: You drink to forget
item.description:
This was the face I made when I found out Kissenger had died.
His brother on the other hand will initiate a revolution in Ferengi society.
Doctor Who: Giant Dinosaurs have been spotted going through 16th Century Edinburgh! Doctor Who the next moment: You don't judge people how they act before Kings, you judge them on how they act toward those on the bottom of society.
Yes
free my mans
The more I read about the 19th century temperance movement the more I think it's a mix of well meaning people who got the wrong end of the stick and a load of conservative religious moralists who believe the only thing preventing the establishment of Paradise was someone having a pint on a Saturday.
I wish I could say "this misrepresents furries" but there are in fact, NeoReactionary and Nazi Furries. also mod link https://www.nexusmods.com/newvegas/mods/61931
Wouldn't this lead to rich people just censoring articles they don't like?
This man has an amazing energy.
For Chats: http://discord.abbii.gay For Shitposts: http://tumblr.abbii.gay For srs and maybe shitposts: http://mastodon.abbii.gay
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: More Celebrities should come out against Trump, look at all this Publicity
item.dc:creator: jrpsmith

item.title: Never Too Old: Elmo & ‘Sesame Street’ Still There to Help Us ... 'I gotta be honest Elmo, I’m not doing too hot,' one X user told the Muppet ...
item.description: “Elmo is just checking in! How is everybody doing?” read a post Monday on the official X, formerly Twitter, account for Sesame Street’s furry red monster. Not many are doing so great right now, according to the replies. The post garnered more than 27,000 quotes on X, with most responses airing grievances about the current state of the world. “I gotta be honest elmo, i’m not doing too hot,” one user responded. “I’m going to [expletive] lose it soon elmo!!” another wrote. “I don’t know how to answer that without traumatizing you Elmo,” added another. "Wow! Elmo is glad he asked!" the Muppet tweeted Tuesday. "Elmo learned that it is important to ask a friend how they are doing. Elmo will check in again soon, friends! Elmo loves you." On Monday afternoon, the official account for Sesame Street intervened, offering mental health resources from its nonprofit, Sesame Workshop.
item.dc:creator: Jbelkin
